solutions.solution:
(c) pre not bis → smoking is harmful
vog dor not → avoid harmful habit
dor bis yel → please avoid smoking
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), harmful = not
From Eqs. (ii) and (iii), avoid = dor
∴ habit = vog

(b) where are you → pit ka ta
are they there → sa da ka
they may come → da na ja
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), are = ka
From Eqs. (ii) and (iii), they = da, there = sa

(c) how old are you → ko to po ha
you are very beautiful → na po da to
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), you are = to po, how = 'ko' or 'ha'

(c) no more food → ta ka da
more than that → sa ku ka
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), more = ka, that = sa or 'ta'

(c) nik ma de → he has come
de lit pa → come here fast
ma la se → she has gone
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), come = de
From Eqs. (i) and (iii), has = ma, he = nik

(c) monday is a holiday → sa da na ha
they enjoy a holiday → da ga la ka
From Eqs (i) and (ii), a holiday = da na, monday = 'sa' or 'ha'

(c) sun shines brightly → sa lo sul
houses are brightly lit → kado ula an ba
light comes from sun → dopi kup lo mo
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), brightly → ba
From Eqs. (i) and (iii), sun → lo
Hence, sun → lo and brightly → ba

(c) oka peru → fine cloths
meta lisa → clear water
dona lisa peru → fine clear weather
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), peru → fine
From Eqs. (ii) and (iii), lisa → clear
Hence, weather → dona
(d) According to the question, Code for 'not' ⇒ 8 or 5 or 2
(b) According to the question, Code for 'good' ⇒ 9
(d) Data inadequate to answer the question, as code for 'flowers' and 'not' cannot be determined.

(c) are ⇒ 6, you ⇒ 1, where ⇒ 4
∴ are you where ⇒ 614

(d) 5 ⇒ flowers/not/bad
9 ⇒ good
Hence, code for '59' cannot be determined as data is inadequate.

very large risk associated → nu da ro gi
risk is very low → gi je nu mi
is that also associated → sa mi po
inherent risk also damaging → di nu di yu

Solutions (Q. Nos. 16-20)
where are you → 4 6 1
you are good → 1 6 9
flowers are not bad → 8 6 5 2
From Eqs. (i), (ii) and (iii), are ⇒ 6
From Eqs. (i) and (ii), you ⇒ 1, where ⇒ 4, good ⇒ 9
From Eq. (iii), flowers ⇒ 8/5/2, not ⇒ 8/5/2, bad ⇒ 8/5/2
Solutions (Q. Nos. 21-25) On the basis of given information
